urdu transliteration text:
Saqaa e haram, rakh lena bharam
Hum dar pe tumhaare aaye hain
english translation text:
O quencher of the thirst of the family (of Hussain), retain our faith and trust in you
We have come to your door

urdu transliteration text: ABBAS ABBAS YA ABAL FADHLIL ABBAS
Tum bhi nahi humko thukrana, hum dunya ke thukraae hain
english translation text: Do not let us down, the world has let us already down

urdu transliteration text: Ab saare sahare toot chuke – hume apne paraye loot chuke,Tum apni panaho me lelo hum gham se bohot ghabraaye hain
english translation text: All our support has been shattered, everyone has let us down.Take us into your haven, we are anxious through all the grief we have endured

urdu transliteration text: Har sooni godi khil jaaye – har beti ko rishta miljaae, Un chehro(n) ko ronaq dedo jo gham ke sabab murjhaae hain
english translation text: May all empty laps be filled with a child, may all daughters get a suitable partner. Give happiness to those faces which are filled with sadness

urdu transliteration text: Mola tum baab e hawaaij ho – roze pe unhe bhi bulwalo, Ghurbat ke sabab jo aa na sake hum unke areeze laaye hain
english translation text: Master, you fulfil our wishes, please call everyone to your shrine. Those that have not been able to make it, we have brought their wishes (letters) to you

urdu transliteration text: Darbaar sakhi abbas ka tha – kuch maangna tha lazim maanga, Lekin yeh haqeeqat bhi hai qamar hum pursa dene aaye hai
english translation text:
The door was of the generous Abbas, we asked for as much as we wanted
The truth is however, we have come here to pay our respects and give condolences
